---
title: 'God provides...'
date: '2020-04-10T06:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5056059521329070211'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/god-provides.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

I went to church tonight and helped produce the Easter Service. Since nobody can come we recorded it ahead of time.<div><br></div><div>While I was there, there was some old equipment they had in storage they were looking to give away. One item was exactly what I'd been praying about buying to help with my possible transition to Voiceover and/or Podcasting.</div><div><br></div><div>God has a way of showing up to provide when you need it. Sometimes, he shows up with items before you need them either because you'll need them earlier than you'd planned out because he wants to affirm you're on the right path.</div><div><br></div><div>Here's a sneak peak at coming attractions...</div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500894188288-0-03fea6a53caf.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500894188288-0-03fea6a53caf.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500887541121-1-3b6d40fce496.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500887541121-1-3b6d40fce496.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500882144333-2-fe013e0bb3f0.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500882144333-2-fe013e0bb3f0.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500875169226-3-e5cf5bec72df.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500875169226-3-e5cf5bec72df.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500869747089-4-eda20d09add7.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500869747089-4-eda20d09add7.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div>Let the games begin....</div><div><br><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500862540206-5-eabab8d776c8.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500862540206-5-eabab8d776c8.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500855260046-6-44024f2ac161.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1586500855260046-6-44024f2ac161.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div>
